title: Implement Runtime Dependency Governance
description: Architect fallback mechanisms to maintain application stability when remote MFE modules fail to load. Implement version-mismatch policies to manage dependency conflicts in a federated environment. Design strategies to ensure the main application shell remains resilient to remote module failures or version drift.
objectives: Architect fallback mechanisms to maintain application stability when remote MFE modules fail to load.
